description_long: This object is a stone obelisk monument set atop a multi-tiered rectangular base, with a series of broad, flat steps leading up to a central plinth. The structure is constructed from gray stone, showing signs of weathering and some patches of moss or grass, particularly on the upper surfaces. The front features a set of short, wide stairs flanked by low stone railings, providing access to the raised platform. The obelisk itself is relatively squat and blocky, with a square cross-section and a slightly tapered top, sitting on a smaller pedestal at the center of the base. The surrounding ground is paved and scattered with fallen leaves, suggesting an outdoor urban or park setting. There are no visible inscriptions or decorative carvings, giving the monument a simple, utilitarian appearance.
description: A gray stone obelisk monument with a multi-tiered rectangular base, broad steps, and patches of moss, set in a paved outdoor area.
description_view_0: Side view showing the stepped base, central plinth, and moss patches on the upper surfaces.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the wide stairs, low railings, and direct access to the obelisk's platform.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with visible steps and more pronounced moss coverage on the right side.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the obelisk and the full extent of the stepped base, with moss concentrated on the upper platform.
attribute_base_design: The base consists of three broad, rectangular stone steps forming a tiered platform, with a set of wide stairs and low railings at the front. The uppermost platform supports the obelisk and is partially covered with moss or grass.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is flat and square, matching the blocky, utilitarian style of the monument, with no visible decorations or unique features.
attribute_surrounding_features: The obelisk is surrounded by a paved surface with scattered fallen leaves and patches of moss or grass on the monument itself.
